goal: Build an industrial sortation cell: 8 cubes (2 each of red/blue/green/yellow + 2 unmarked defectives) routed to 4 color bins via color_routing, defectives fall through to RejectBin. Combines CP-16 (4-color) + CP-18 (reject fall-through) patterns.
thoughts:
Six industrial-sort specifics for CP-35 (combines CP-16 + CP-18):
1) 10 cubes total: 2× red + 2× blue + 2× green + 2× yellow + 2× defective. Defectives have NO semantic label.
2) 5 destination bins: RedBin, BlueBin, GreenBin, YellowBin, RejectBin. RejectBin gets unmarked cubes via destination_path fall-through.
3) color_routing dict has 4 entries (one per color). Defectives match no key → fall through to destination_path = RejectBin.
4) Bins arranged in row at y=-0.5, x=[-0.6, -0.3, 0.0, +0.3, +0.6]. RejectBin at far left x=-0.6.
5) 10 cubes on conveyor at 0.20m spacing, x=[-1.6 to +0.2]. Mixed order to demonstrate runtime routing.
6) Industrial use: production-line quality sorter — pass/fail + multiple SKU classes.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1500.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[4.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# Materials for 4 colors + grey for defectives
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Red",    shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0])
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Blue",   shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.0, 0.0, 1.0])
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Green",  shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.0, 1.0, 0.0])
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Yellow", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[1.0, 1.0, 0.0])
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Grey",   shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.5, 0.5, 0.5])

# 8 cubes — 2 per color
color_specs = [
    ("/World/Cube_r1", -1.6, "red"),
    ("/World/Cube_b1", -1.4, "blue"),
    ("/World/Cube_d1", -1.2, None),  # defective — no label
    ("/World/Cube_g1", -1.0, "green"),
    ("/World/Cube_y1", -0.8, "yellow"),
    ("/World/Cube_r2", -0.6, "red"),
    ("/World/Cube_b2", -0.4, "blue"),
    ("/World/Cube_d2", -0.2, None),  # defective
    ("/World/Cube_g2",  0.0, "green"),
    ("/World/Cube_y2",  0.2, "yellow"),
]
for path, x, name in color_specs:
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    if name:
        assign_material(prim_path=path, material_path=f"/World/Materials/{name.capitalize()}")
        set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, class_name=name, semantic_type="color")
    else:
        assign_material(prim_path=path, material_path="/World/Materials/Grey")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[c[0] for c in color_specs],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for c in color_specs:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=c[0], material_name="rubber")

# 5 destination bins arranged in row
bin_specs = [
    ("/World/RejectBin", -0.6, "Grey"),
    ("/World/RedBin",    -0.3, "Red"),
    ("/World/GreenBin",   0.0, "Green"),
    ("/World/BlueBin",    0.3, "Blue"),
    ("/World/YellowBin",  0.6, "Yellow"),
]
for path, x, mat in bin_specs:
    create_bin(prim_path=path, position=[x, -0.5, 0.75], size=[0.18, 0.18, 0.15])
    assign_material(prim_path=path, material_path=f"/World/Materials/{mat}")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[c[0] for c in color_specs],
    destination_path="/World/RejectBin",
    color_routing={
        "red":    "/World/RedBin",
        "blue":   "/World/BlueBin",
        "green":  "/World/GreenBin",
        "yellow": "/World/YellowBin",
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/RedBin", "/World/BlueBin", "/World/GreenBin", "/World/YellowBin", "/World/RejectBin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-35 combines CP-16's 4-color sortation with CP-18's reject fall-through. 10 cubes (8 colored + 2 defective) → 5 bins via color_routing + destination_path fall-through. Production-grade sorter pattern.

)
failure_modes: Cubes_y2 starts at x=+0.2 (within reach) — picked first by reach selection. Doesn't matter; routing by color works regardless.
5 bins arranged tightly (0.30m spacing) — robot transit between bins must avoid each. planning_obstacles include all 5.
Defective cube color (grey) matches no semantic class → fall-through to RejectBin (destination_path). Tested in CP-18.
Function-gate would take ~10 cubes × 7s/cycle = 70+ seconds to fully process all cubes. Long sim.
verified_status: draft; passes=1 n=13 wilson_lower=0.0137; was form-gate-pending; demoted 2026-05-15
